mapper.insert: INSERT INTO quiz_sessions(id, user_id, wordbook_id, mode, total_questions, answered_questions, correct_answers, status, started_at) VALUES (#{id}, #{userId}, #{wordbookId}, #{mode}, #{totalQuestions}, 0, 0, 'ACTIVE', #{startedAt})
mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, wordbook_id, mode, total_questions, answered_questions, correct_answers, status FROM quiz_sessions WHERE id = #{sessionId} AND user_id = #{userId} LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE quiz_sessions SET answered_questions = answered_questions + 1, correct_answers = correct_answers + 1, status = CASE WHEN answered_questions + 1 >= total_questions THEN 'COMPLETED' ELSE status END, finished_at = CASE WHEN answered_questions + 1 >= total_questions THEN CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ELSE finished_at END WHERE id = #{sessionId}
